nasb.text: Then you shall celebrate the Feast of Weeks to the Lord your God with a tribute of a freewill offering of your hand, which you shall give just as the Lord your God blesses you;

esv.text: Then you shall keep the Feast of Weeks to the Lord your God with the tribute of a freewill offering from your hand, which you shall give as the Lord your God blesses you.

cnv.text: 你要向耶和華你的　神舉行七七節，照著耶和華你的　神賜福你的，盡你所能的獻上你手裡的甘心祭。

ccb.text: 七周后，要为你们的上帝耶和华守七七收获节。那时，你们要按照你们的上帝耶和华所赐的福分，甘心乐意地献上祭物。
